origin_retry: I need the pickup city name. For example: Delhi, Mumbai, Jaipur
destination_retry: Please tell me the delivery city. For example: Bangalore, Chennai
material_retry: What type of goods? For example: cement, steel, electronics
weight: How much does it weigh (in tonnes)?
weight_retry: Please enter weight in tonnes. For example: 10, 25
truck_type: What truck type do you need? (open/closed/container/any)
price_retry: Please enter the price in rupees. For example: 25000, 50000
